name: Chili Soup Jarlsberg
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown beef in hot oil in a large, deep saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add broth and bring to a boil over high heat.
3. Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 1 hour.
4. Add beans, tomatoes, peppers, onion, garlic, 3 teaspoons chili powder, and cumin.
5. Simmer, covered, for 30 minutes.
6. Gradually blend in half of the Jarlsberg cheese until melted.
7. In a small bowl, blend butter with the small garlic clove and remaining ¼ teaspoon chili powder.
8. Spread mixture on crispbreads and arrange on a cookie sheet.
9. Bake at 375°F in a preheated oven for several minutes or until butter is melted.
10. Sprinkle with half of the Jarlsberg cheese and bake until melted.
11. Ladle soup into bowls and garnish with remaining Jarlsberg cheese.
12. Serve with crispbreads.
